title: Add product image with clickable redirect to Meesho affiliate link

requirements.text: Add the uploaded product image (ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg) to the product browsing page below the existing content sections
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded t-shirt product image is displayed on the ProductBrowse page
The image appears below the existing SwipeableGallery and CategoryImageSection components
The image maintains proper aspect ratio and responsive sizing

requirements.text: Make the product image clickable and redirect to the Meesho affiliate URL: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=613389026&ext_id=a57202&utm_source=instagram_stories when clicked

quotes: add lookout options on clicking it redirect into https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=613389026&ext_id=a57202&utm_source=instagram_stories

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the product image opens the Meesho affiliate link in a new tab
The full URL with all query parameters is preserved in the redirect
Visual affordance (hover effect or cursor change) indicates the image is clickable

constraints: Use the exact uploaded image filename: ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg
Preserve the complete Meesho affiliate URL with all query parameters
Follow existing image loading patterns using useImageLoader hook and LoadingTimeout component
nonGoals: Creating a new backend product entry for this image
Modifying the existing SwipeableGallery or WatchProductSection components
Adding image editing or transformation features
